overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a first-person vehicle drive through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The vehicle navigates from urban streets through an industrial corridor, onto an elevated highway, and finally stops at a gas station. Heavy rain creates wet reflective surfaces throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet urban arterial road with sodium street lighting

events.description: accelerating from 40 km/h to 60 km/h on rain-slicked roads
approaching industrial district with metal roll-up shutters visible on left

agents.ego_description: driving through rain-soaked city streets at moderate speed, navigating gentle curves

entered.detail: tall sodium vapor street lamps casting orange light on wet pavement
rain-slicked asphalt with double yellow lines reflecting street lights
low-rise industrial warehouses with dark facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person vehicle perspective driving through heavy rain on wet urban streets at night. Orange sodium street lamps illuminate the road ahead as the vehicle accelerates past industrial warehouses. The dashboard displays show increasing speed as the vehicle navigates the rain-slicked arterial road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial corridor with metal roll-up shutters

events.description: entering covered industrial corridor with metal shutters on left side
making left turn at intersection, speed decreasing to 24 km/h

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow industrial corridor and executing left turn at intersection

entered.detail: corrugated metal roll-up shutters on industrial storage units
tall chain-link fence with concrete posts running along right side
thick concrete support pillars for the overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered industrial corridor lined with metal roll-up shutters on the left and chain-link fencing on the right. The space feels more enclosed and sheltered from the rain. The driver slows down and makes a left turn at an intersection with crosswalk markings, transitioning from the open street into this industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with concrete barriers and digital billboards

events.description: merging onto elevated highway with concrete safety barriers
accelerating to highway cruising speed of 80+ km/h

agents.ego_description: accelerating on elevated highway, passing illuminated digital billboards on the walls

entered.detail: tall concrete highway barriers with weathered yellow paint stripes
matching concrete barriers on right side of highway
large illuminated advertising screens mounted on highway walls

segments.scene_description: Exiting the industrial corridor, the vehicle merges onto an elevated highway flanked by tall concrete barriers. Digital billboards illuminate the right side with advertisements. The vehicle accelerates rapidly, reaching speeds over 80 km/h as it cruises along the rain-wet highway, the city lights visible in the distance through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with neon signage approaching gas station

events.description: exiting highway ramp into commercial area with bright neon signs
pedestrian in yellow jacket crossing ahead, vehicle slowing
decelerating to 20 km/h approaching gas station intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating through neon-lit commercial streets, slowing for pedestrian crossing and intersection traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow reflective jacket crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: bright red and cyan neon commercial signage on building facades
illuminated gas station canopy with green neon trim becoming visible
low-rise commercial structures with large glass windows and advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the highway into a vibrant commercial district illuminated by colorful neon signs. The driver decelerates significantly as a pedestrian in a yellow reflective jacket crosses the street ahead. A gas station with a lit canopy becomes visible on the left as the vehicle navigates the wet commercial streets, speed dropping to prepare for the final approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station parking and refueling area under canopy

events.description: coming to complete stop at gas station parking area

agents.ego_description: pulling into gas station parking area and bringing the vehicle to a complete stop

entered.detail: fuel pumps under the illuminated station canopy
derelict parked cars and trucks in the station lot
thick support pillars holding up the gas station canopy

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle pulling into a gas station parking area, passing under the illuminated canopy. The driver maneuvers past parked vehicles and concrete pillars, bringing the car to a complete stop. The rain continues to fall as the vehicle comes to rest in the sheltered refueling area, ending the journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city, transitioning from industrial arterial roads to a high-speed highway and finally into a neon-lit commercial district. It begins by accelerating past industrial warehouses under orange sodium lamps, with the dashboard reflecting increasing speed on the wet pavement. As the vehicle makes a left turn at a crosswalk, the scene shifts into a sheltered industrial corridor lined with metal shutters and chain-link fencing before merging onto an elevated highway. The camera then captures a rapid surge in speed past digital billboards and concrete barriers, eventually decelerating as it exits the highway into a vibrant district filled with colorful neon signs and pedestrians. Finally, the vehicle maneuvers past parked cars and concrete pillars to come to a complete stop under the illuminated canopy of a gas station.
